recent_excerpts: Kaspersky details CrystalX RAT, a MaaS malware with spyware, credential theft, and prankware features targeting Windows users globally since mid-2025.
Kaspersky's 2026 Global Report finds ransomware dwell time fell to 3.5 days in 2025, down from 5 days, as attackers accelerate encryption.
Kaspersky discovered Lotus Wiper, a novel file wiper targeting Venezuela's energy and utilities sector since late 2025.
